channel.title: Black-Hat-Asia-2024 on jigsaw
channel.description: Recent content in Black-Hat-Asia-2024 on jigsaw

item.title: My Experience at Black Hat Asia 2024 as a Student
item.description: Introduction So, Black Hat Asia 2024! A big conference filled with a lot of cybersecurity booths and talks and I might add that the price of the ticket was very… very… expensive. Fortunately, Black Hat does offer sponsorships for students! With all my assignments and final year project not done, I irresponsibly signed up for it! And guess what? I got it! Double Sponsorship Well the reason how I discovered I was sponsored was because Mr Yapp from Malaysia Cybersecurity Camp (MCC) asked us (us being MCC peeps) whether we got the email for it and me being a person who never checks my email went “I should check my emails more often”.
